original_image_tags: Handwritten signature in cursive ink, "Don Nelson", followed by "Oklahoma City" written in cursive ink below the signature line.

elements.description: A typed document page containing four paragraphs of text regarding flying saucers. There is a handwritten signature 'Dan Nelson' with 'Oklahoma City' written underneath it. A number '5' is handwritten in the top left corner, and '53' is handwritten in the bottom right corner. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps.

judge.reason: Description A quotes the signature as 'Don Nelson', while Description B quotes it as 'Dan Nelson' — a direct contradiction on specific verbatim text within the visual content.
